reviews.comment:
Nos permitieron estacionar con el motorhome. El gerente fue muy amable y atento ante un inconviente q nos obligo a hacer noche ahi. Puso todo a disposicion. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
They allowed us to park our motorhome. The manager was very kind and helpful when we had a problem that forced us to spend the night there. He made everything available to us. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5LTlLRTVnRRAB
